runner: Claude Opus 4.8 via Claude Code Desktop (native harness)
notes: Run in Claude Code Desktop (Anthropic's native agent harness); separate native-harness counterpart to the VS Code Claude Code Opus entry. "Garden Siege" — a complete, single-file mini Plants-vs-Zombies, planned first in a header comment and then built. State machine: menu / how-to / leaderboard / play / pause / game-over / win. 5 lanes x 9 columns, letterbox-scaled to the window. Sun economy (sky drops + Sunflowers, click to collect). Five plants — Sunflower, Peashooter, Snow Pea (slows), Wall-nut, Cherry Bomb (3x3 blast) — each with cost, recharge veil and can't-afford dimming, plus a shovel. Three zombies (basic / cone / bucket) with armour and HP bars; one lawnmower per lane as a last line of defence. 8 escalating waves ending in a final rush; score from kills + waves + leftover sun; top-10 leaderboard persisted in localStorage with in-canvas name entry. Projectiles, frost slow, particles, floating text, hover placement preview and tiny mutable WebAudio blips. Verified playable in-browser (placement, shooting, kills, scoring) with no console errors.
